case_title: SF HOUSING AUTHORITY vs. ROSALES, MARIBAL et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOUSING AUTHORITY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A PUBLIC CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROSALES, MARIBAL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 3175-26TH STREET, #251 S.F.
